languages.text: "Бомбардировка приостановлена. Или ты уже забыл{mf||а}, о чем мы говорили?"
"The bombardment has been paused. Or have you already forgotten what we discussed?"
languages.original_text: "Бомбардировка приостановлена. Или ты уже забыл{mf||а}, о чем мы говорили?"

traits.locale_text: "The bombardment has been paused. Or have you already forgotten what we discussed?"
"The bombardment has been paused. Or have you already forgotten what we discussed?"
"The bombardment has been paused. Or have you already forgotten what we discussed?"

languages.text: «El bombardeo está en pausa. ¿Es que ha olvidado lo que hablamos?».
languages.original_text: "The bombardment has been paused. Or have you already forgotten what we discussed?"

traits.locale_text: «El bombardeo está en pausa. ¿Es que ha olvidado lo que hablamos?».

languages.text: “轰炸已经暂停了。还是说，你把我们谈好的事全都忘了？”
languages.original_text: "The bombardment has been paused. Or have you already forgotten what we discussed?"

traits.locale_text: “轰炸已经暂停了。还是说，你把我们谈好的事全都忘了？”

languages.text: « Le bombardement a été ajourné. Auriez-vous déjà oublié notre accord ? »
languages.original_text: "The bombardment has been paused. Or have you already forgotten what we discussed?"

traits.locale_text: « Le bombardement a été ajourné. Auriez-vous déjà oublié notre accord ? »

languages.text: "Bombardıman durduruldu. Yoksa konuştuklarımızı çoktan unuttunuz mu?"
languages.original_text: "The bombardment has been paused. Or have you already forgotten what we discussed?"

traits.locale_text: "Bombardıman durduruldu. Yoksa konuştuklarımızı çoktan unuttunuz mu?"

languages.text: "Das Bombardement wurde unterbrochen. Oder habt Ihr schon vergessen, was wir besprochen haben?"
languages.original_text: "The bombardment has been paused. Or have you already forgotten what we discussed?"

traits.locale_text: "Das Bombardement wurde unterbrochen. Oder habt Ihr schon vergessen, was wir besprochen haben?"

languages.text: 「砲撃は一時停止されている。それとも、我々が話し合ったことをもう忘れてしまったのか？」
languages.original_text: "The bombardment has been paused. Or have you already forgotten what we discussed?"

traits.locale_text: 「砲撃は一時停止されている。それとも、我々が話し合ったことをもう忘れてしまったのか？」
